description.value: Aura strong transmutation; CL 13th; Weight â; Price +49,000 gp DESCRIPTION On command, this ability allows the wearer of the armor to become ethereal (as the ethereal jaunt spell) once per day. The character can remain ethereal for as long as desired, but once he returns to normal, he cannot become ethereal again that day. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells ethereal jaunt; Cost +24,500 gp
